title: Planchonella brousmichei
taxonomy: Planchonella brousmichei is classified within the family Sapotaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the sapodilla or soapberry family. The genus Planchonella is a part of this family, consisting of various species of trees and shrubs found in the Pacific Islands and Australia. Planchonella brousmichei is native to New Caledonia and is often found in coastal and mountainous regions. The classification of Planchonella brousmichei reflects its unique characteristics and geographical distribution within the Sapotaceae family.
